title: Foundation
goals: ["hear and match a reference note", "hold a stable tone", "develop safe onset and breath basics"]
entry_criteria: ["new user OR route in R1/R3", "baseline overall < 55 OR self-report beginner"]

title: Control
learner_profile: learner can find pitch but struggles to stay controlled
goals: ["reduce drift and wobble", "improve slides and interval control", "build repeatable pitch entry"]

title: Tone and Style
learner_profile: learner sings in tune but needs better sound and flexibility
goals: ["shape vowels and resonance", "control dynamics without pitch loss", "start register awareness"]

title: Musicality
learner_profile: learner needs phrasing, meaning, and interpretive control
goals: ["shape lines musically", "deliver contour and phrase breath intentionally", "connect technical singing to expression"]

title: Performance
learner_profile: learner aims for repeatable, expressive, pressure-ready singing
goals: ["perform consistently", "maintain control under longer phrases", "refine stylistic and professional polish"]
